name: Relation Prompt Grounding
description: Physically assemble five objects from a moving carousel so a generated three-relation contract remains true after a force-driven settle inspection.
natural_language: Move all five objects from the rotating carousel to the worktable. Satisfy every posted left/right, containment, contact, and depth relation, run the full settle inspection, then certify the stable graph.

metadata.variant_count_kind: object-carousel phases, relation directions, constraint subsets, depth order, and settle-force combinations
metadata.notes: Five original objects must be physically carried from a moving carousel, manipulated in both x/y and depth, and observed through a deterministic settle phase; the verifier independently reconstructs every gesture and the final geometric relation graph.
